name: stock-transfers-list
description: Returns transfer list for Pending or Completed view with direction indicators and context-aware status badges
author: Claude

parameters.name: SiteIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated Site IDs the user has access to

parameters.name: FilterSiteId
parameters.description: Optional: filter to a specific counterpart site (0 = all)

parameters.name: StartDate
parameters.description: Optional: start date filter (Completed view only)

parameters.name: EndDate
parameters.description: Optional: end date filter (Completed view only)
